name: Potato Rice Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Arrowhead Gold Brown Rice Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: Arrowhead Gold Brown Rice Flour, Arrowhead Potato Flakes, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, mix water or soymilk and eggs (if using).
3. Combine the wet and dry ingredients until well blended.
4. Heat a non-stick griddle over medium heat.
5. Pour small amounts of batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook each pancake until golden brown on both sides.
7. Serve with syrup or gravy.
NOTE: This recipe does not work well for waffles. The addition of eggs gives them more the consistency of wheat flour pancakes.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs"
